name: Draco Awakening
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>呼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>搏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand ("True Draco", "True King", "Dracoslayer" Pendulum, or "Dracoverlord" Pendulum). If a face-up "True Draco" or "True King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 of them; place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. You can only use this effect of "Draco Awakening" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Draco Awakening" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand ("True Draco", "True King", "Dracoslayer" Pendulum, or "Dracoverlord" Pendulum). If a face-up "True Draco" or "True King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 of them; place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. You can only use this effect of "Draco Awakening" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Draco Awakening" per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
